author: sharath chandra K.
pros: I use SEOPoz daily. I like the way dashboards are presented here. and this is the first tool I look into If I want to do a keyword research. All the dashboards are given in a well-formatted charts . Everybody should give it a try.
cons: Nothing so far!. Pricing is cheap.. try free trial once before purchasing
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Ubaid U.
pros: I like how simple it is to use software and see how your site ranks in SERP
cons: So far so good. Better than conventional SERP Tools
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: roberto D.
pros: The software is simple to use, automatic. It's a simplified tool to monitor your SEO traffic. A very good tool for beginners. They have a useful free plan and a reasonable cheap pay plan. Ecxelent support. .
cons: The keywords rankings are not updated so frequently but still can give you a sense of what's going on on your website. You need to do also double check on the rankings that SeoPoz shows because some of them are not reliable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall SEOPoz is a terrific value for the money. You can easily track keywords in the interface, on both mobile and desktop. It integrates with Search Console and Analytics and gives a clear picture of ranking keywords and traffic, as well as page performance.
author: Nadene E.
pros: Easy to use and install. Simple interface. Easy navigation
cons: Would like to customize controls more, and move the elements around. Minor.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Weekly review of the site and other social networks
description: I really like SEO programs and working with them makes working with the site easier
author: Tamara M.
pros: I like statistics and the SEO program itself makes it easier for me to work on social networks.
cons: One minus is the long loading of the new domain.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Saalim T.
pros: Well SeoPoz is very good software, the thing i always like of SeoPoz is it give every permutation and combination of keywords which you are ranking
cons: 40% keywords in SeoPoz suggestion is not relevant
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Parimal S.
pros: Better service and fast support by SEOPOZ team.
cons: I think All right s e o service but price some high.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Valerie V.
pros: it was quite easy to learn and apply. it also allows us to have more free time
cons: adaptability and easy to use our small company just love it

description: I like this tool because it is inexpensive and gives me the basic daily ranking information for websites.

pros: Easy and ready to use for quickly checking rankings for any website.
cons: Missing features of other popular SEO software, such as Audits, which are very important in showing clients what areas of their sites need improvement for SEO and better performance and rankings.

author: Frank A.
pros: I need it every week for the optimization of my SEO

cons: paid service for small websites with very low traffic

review_title: Excelente plataforma, facilita mucho el análisis de las estadísticas de GSC

pros: La facilidad y los reportes de posiciones, facilitan mucho crear reportes mensuales para los clientes.
cons: En general esta bien, pero en lo personal faltan algunas características que pueden añadir para facilitar aun mas el uso y análisis de los datos.

description: Great but there need to be a competitor keyword research module.

author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I really enjoy using the services regularly and optimize my SEO performance
author: David E.
pros: I like the simple dashboard metrics where I can easily and quickly review SEO data
cons: I did not have any issues with the dashboard
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: William M.
pros: With SEOMOZ, I get to know the position of my website's main keywords, day after day. I can create a strategy based on accurate data, for example, leaving the pages of the best keywords, with more content. The integration with Google is wonderful. Support is 10, they always answered my questions. I recommend to everyone.
cons: The possibility to add keywords manually. But they have already informed me that they are working on this.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Such a good software. Easy to Use. It helps in decision making and It shows overall statistics

description: I am able to identify my target market easily and track impressions made on my website. Thank you SEO POZ for helping my business grow.
